# Cardiovascular disease & hypertension

::: {.callout-note}
## Chapter in preparation
This Part IV chapter is planned but not yet drafted. It will cover nutrition in cardiovascular disease and hypertension — the therapeutic DASH pattern, sodium, and dietary fats and lipids.

Earlier chapters point here for the clinical detail they defer — for now they handle it at
**recognise-and-refer** altitude, and the full management lands in this chapter.
:::
